description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He has medium-length, slightly shaggy hair that covers his ears and forehead. He is dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt featuring a printed logo on the chest, paired with straight-cut pants and low-top sneakers. The figure's facial features are simplified, with a neutral expression and no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing fits loosely, and the shoes have a thick sole, suggesting comfort and everyday use. The overall appearance is that of a typical urban pedestrian, suitable for modern city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male with medium-length hair, t-shirt, pants, and sneakers, standing in a T-pose. The figure has a stylized, simplified appearance and neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the t-shirt logo, facial features, and full arm span.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, hair volume, and shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, plain back of the shirt, and straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
